title: NGB
description: Modpack aims to boost fps, add missing features and improve multiplayer with friends.
body:
### A modpack to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience, with small changes to gameplay and some fun mods to take multiplayer a step further.

Also comes with the latest optimization mods with shader support. Big FPS boost. Inspiration taken from  [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)

**Altering gameplay**
- Anvils with a fixed repair cost 
- Nature's compass lets you find specific biome



**Non-altering gameplay**
- Adds camera for taking pictures
